case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BIRKENFELD CAROL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BIRKENFELD CAROL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BIRKENFELD CAROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIRKENFELD CAROL PLTFF. TO PAY DEFENDANT $68.OO COURT COSTS. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24027 ON 10-12-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BIRKENFELD CAROL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRKENFELD CAROL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24027, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
